pageContext.name: Loid Forger
pageContext.description: Sideshow and the FuRyu Corporation present the Loid Forger Figure.  From the hit anime series Spy x Family comes a new F:Nex figure of Loid Forger also known as code name: Twilight!  Loid walks briskly across the cobblestone base in a three-piece deep green suit, with a silenced pistol in hand. The three-piece suit is beautifully graded with a deep shade of green, and his red tie contrasts and shines through.  Loid has been carefully recreated down to the last detail, from suit pockets and button handles to the badges at the collar.
